name: Honeycomb
philosophy: Distributed-systems observability rendered as a smart magazine — honey-amber on midnight teal, literal hexagon dividers, technical-but-warm voice.

design_language.motion_signature: 220ms ease-out hover with honey-amber CTA glow ring; hex-divider 600ms stagger on scroll-in.

trademark_signals: Honey-amber on midnight-teal — the dominant wasp-colors pairing
Literal hexagon shape used as section dividers and icon containers
BubbleUp and Canvas product-feature visuals get full-bleed treatment
Customer quotes set larger than body copy — testimonials carry editorial weight
Mono inline in body for span names, attributes, query syntax
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use purple/violet — the dev-observability cliche
Don't introduce mascot characters — the brand is the hexagon
Don't use saturated rainbow data viz
